item.title: Zhili He
item.description: Zhili He Position: Visiting Student Contact: 2019190606011@std.uestc.edu.cn Bio: Zhili He is a sophomore undergradute student from University of Electronic Science and Technology of China and his research interests are mainly about the area of Internet of Things.
